name: Doodle
description: Doodle — Online scheduling tool for coordinating meeting times via polls, with API for automated scheduling workflows.

seo.title: Doodle — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Doodle: Doodle — Online scheduling tool for coordinating meeting times via polls, with API for automated scheduling workflows.

when_to_use: Group availability poll for recurring team meetings
Interview scheduling across candidate and interviewer
Multi-timezone meeting coordination for remote teams
Client-facing scheduling links for consulting bookings
Automated meeting time suggestions from calendar data

cons: Calendly and Cal.com run circles around it
review.verdict: A legacy scheduler coasting on brand—new users should choose Calendly or Cal.com instead.
review.best_for: Groups that specifically want poll-style 'when works for you' coordination
review.not_for: Any 1:1 scheduling or sales flow—modern alternatives dominate there

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
